Thought 7: Based on the summarized evidence, Freya has a clear motive (debt and threat of exposure), opportunity (present at the wrestling match with a public argument), and means (combat training and ownership of a halberd matching the crime scene weapon). Elizabeth has a motive (affair and personal conflict) but no evidence placing her at the scene of the murder (the wrestling ring). The murder occurred during a public event where Freya was present, not in the theatre where Elizabeth works. Therefore, Freya is the most likely murderer.
